evals.name: fresh-idea-intake
evals.prompt: I'm thinking about building an app that helps people find study buddies at their university. Like Tinder but for studying.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 repo scan launched in background, 1-2 intake questions, hard STOP

assertions.name: one_or_two_questions
assertions.description: Asks 1-2 questions max, not a wall of questions

assertions.name: no_research_sprint_turn1
assertions.description: Does NOT dispatch research agents on the very first turn — intake only

assertions.name: hard_stop
assertions.description: Ends with a question and waits — does NOT proceed to synthesize or generate suggestions

assertions.name: repo_scan_launched
assertions.description: Mentions or silently launches a repo/codebase scan agent in background

evals.name: fresh-idea-turn2-research
evals.prompt: It's for college students who want to find people in the same classes to study with. Matching based on courses, study style, and schedule availability.
evals.expected_output: First research sprint dispatched (3 agents), synthesized suggestions with citations, challenge, 1-2 questions, STOP
evals.multi_turn_context: Turn 2. Turn 1: user said 'building study buddy app like Tinder for studying', skill asked intake questions, user now responds with details.

assertions.name: three_agents_dispatched
assertions.description: Dispatches 3 parallel research agents (web, github, competitive) — not fewer

assertions.name: real_citations
assertions.description: At least 3 unique URLs to real repos/articles/products in the synthesis

assertions.name: suggestions_with_evidence
assertions.description: Presents numbered suggestions (3-5) with real-world evidence backing each one

assertions.name: recommendation_labeled
assertions.description: Suggestion #1 is labeled RECOMMENDED with rationale

assertions.name: challenge_present
assertions.description: Includes at least one challenge/pushback after suggestions

assertions.name: ends_with_question
assertions.description: Ends with 1-2 targeted questions to drive next research sprint

assertions.name: hard_stop
assertions.description: Does NOT continue past the questions — waits for user response

assertions.name: depth_is_broad
assertions.description: Research queries are landscape-level (major approaches, who's done this) not implementation-specific

evals.name: turn3-deeper-research
evals.prompt: I like option 2 — the React Native approach with Firebase. But I'm worried about the matching algorithm complexity. Also we need to handle the cold-start problem when a new university joins.
evals.expected_output: Second research sprint (deeper, focused on RN+Firebase+matching), new suggestions building on prior, new challenges, new questions
evals.multi_turn_context: Turn 3. Prior turns: user described study buddy app, first research sprint found 5 approaches, user now picks one and raises two specific concerns.

assertions.name: three_agents_dispatched
assertions.description: Dispatches 3 parallel research agents again — every turn gets a research sprint

assertions.name: research_is_deeper
assertions.description: Search queries target matching algorithms and cold-start specifically, NOT broad 'study buddy app' landscape again

assertions.name: builds_on_prior
assertions.description: References prior turn's findings — does not re-present the same 5 approaches

assertions.name: new_citations
assertions.description: At least 2 URLs not seen in prior turns — fresh research, not recycled

assertions.name: addresses_user_concerns
assertions.description: Suggestions specifically address matching algorithm complexity AND cold-start problem

assertions.name: challenge_present
assertions.description: Challenges the user on at least one assumption or pushes back on scope

assertions.name: ends_with_question
assertions.description: Ends with 1-2 questions that unlock the NEXT research vector

assertions.name: hard_stop
assertions.description: Does NOT continue past the questions

evals.name: brain-dump-intake
evals.prompt: help me build all the suggestions in this chat: [brain dump about eng-buddy]
evals.expected_output: Path B structured extraction with repo context, confirmation gate, no research yet

assertions.name: decided_section
assertions.description: Contains a 'Decided' or 'Decisions already made' section

assertions.name: open_questions_section
assertions.description: Contains an 'Open questions' or 'Gaps' section

assertions.name: no_basic_questions
assertions.description: Does NOT ask basic 'what are you building?' questions already answered by the paste

assertions.name: confirmation_gate
assertions.description: Ends with a confirmation question before proceeding to research

assertions.name: no_research_sprint
assertions.description: Does NOT dispatch research agents or present suggestions on this turn

assertions.name: hard_stop
assertions.description: Stops after asking for confirmation — does not proceed

evals.name: brain-dump-turn2-research
evals.prompt: Yeah that looks right, go ahead and research it
evals.expected_output: First research sprint in brain dump mode: novelty map, suggestions with citations, challenges
evals.multi_turn_context: Turn 2 of brain dump. Turn 1: user pasted eng-buddy brain dump, skill extracted structured summary, user now confirms.

assertions.name: three_agents_dispatched
assertions.description: Dispatches 3 parallel research agents searching for specific brain dump claims

assertions.name: novelty_map_present
assertions.description: Contains a Novelty Map table with solved/partially solved/novel verdicts

assertions.name: real_citations
assertions.description: At least 5 unique URLs to real repos/articles/products

assertions.name: brain_dump_claims_researched
assertions.description: Agents searched for specific architectural claims from the dump, not just broad topic searches

assertions.name: challenge_present
assertions.description: At least one challenge/pushback raised

assertions.name: ends_with_question
assertions.description: Ends with 1-2 targeted questions

assertions.name: hard_stop
assertions.description: Does NOT proceed past questions

evals.name: phase3-gate
evals.prompt: Ok I think I know what I want. Let's turn this into a plan.
evals.expected_output: Vision summary for approval, NOT the full plan yet
evals.multi_turn_context: Turn 6+ of brainstorming. Previous turns explored study-buddy app, settled on React Native + Firebase, matching algorithm, cold-start solution. User now wants to move to planning.

assertions.name: vision_summary
assertions.description: Presents a brief 'here's what we've landed on' summary before generating the full plan

assertions.name: approval_gate
assertions.description: Asks for explicit confirmation before proceeding to full plan generation

assertions.name: does_not_dump_full_plan
assertions.description: Does NOT generate the entire task breakdown, agent assignments, and wave structure in this message

assertions.name: references_plan_template
assertions.description: Reads or references references/plan-template.md for plan generation
